modules.notes: Falcon platform — EDR, XDR, and MDR. Core enterprise endpoint.
Singularity Complete EDR with full threat hunting.
Unified endpoint security and vulnerability management.
Neurons MDM — policy enforcement and UEM.
Defender XDR — unified endpoint, identity, and email detection.
Hardware/VM NGFW with Panorama central management.
Cloud-delivered SASE — ZTNA, SWG, FWaaS.
CNAPP — CSPM, CWPP, code-to-cloud pipeline security.
FortiGate NGFW with integrated IPS and SD-WAN.
FortiSASE — cloud-delivered ZTNA, SWG, CASB.
Cisco Secure Firewall — NGFW, IPS, and application control. Available as appliance or cloud VM.
Cisco Secure Email — anti-phishing, malware filtering.
Cisco XDR — cross-domain threat detection and response.
Quantum NGFW — perimeter firewall and IPS.
CloudGuard — CNAPP for multi-cloud environments.
Juniper SRX NGFW (now part of HPE, acquisition closed July 2025). AI-driven policy enforcement.
Citrix Secure Private Access — ZTNA for internal apps.
Cloudflare One — SSE with ZTNA, SWG, and FWaaS.
Akamai Edge + Guardicore — CDN security and microsegmentation.
ZIA + ZPA — cloud-native secure web gateway and ZTNA.
Netskope One SSE — CASB, SWG, ZTNA, DLP on NewEdge.
Continuous attack surface management and pentest platform.
AWS Security Hub + GuardDuty — cloud posture and threat detection.
AWS Backup — policy-based backup across AWS services.
Azure Security Center and Defender for Cloud — CSPM and CWPP.
Formerly VMware Carbon Black; now Broadcom Enterprise Security. Behavioral EDR for enterprise endpoints.
VMware Aria Cloud Management (now under Broadcom ownership). Cloud cost and infrastructure management.
Wiz CNAPP — agentless cloud security posture and data protection.
Google Chronicle — cloud-native SIEM with petabyte-scale ingestion.
Security Command Center — CSPM and threat detection for GCP.
Okta Workforce Identity — SSO, MFA, and lifecycle management.
Microsoft Entra ID — cloud identity, SSO, conditional access, and identity governance (Entra ID Governance add-on).
CyberArk PAM Self-Hosted — privileged vault and session recording.
CyberArk Identity — SSO, MFA, and access governance.
BeyondTrust PAM — privileged access and session management.
SaaS IGA — access certifications, lifecycle management, access requests.
Saviynt ISPM — identity governance and cloud PAM.
Ping Identity Platform (includes ForgeRock; merged Aug 2023). SSO, MFA, CIAM, and IGA via PingOne Advanced Identity Cloud.
Splunk Enterprise Security — SIEM with advanced threat detection.
SolarWinds Platform — IT monitoring and log management.
Tenable One — unified exposure management across all assets.
InsightVM + InsightIDR — vulnerability management and SIEM/MDR.
Proofpoint Email Security — anti-phishing and BEC protection.
Barracuda Email Protection — gateway and cloud email security.
Barracuda Network Security — NGFW and web filtering.
Veeam Data Platform — backup and recovery for VMs and cloud.
Commvault Cloud — unified data protection and cyber resilience.
GitHub Advanced Security — SAST, SCA, and secrets scanning.
Atlassian (Jira/Confluence) — DevSecOps workflow and audit trails.
ServiceNow SecOps — security incident and vulnerability response.
Vanta — automated compliance monitoring (SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA). GRC platform; not a security capability tool.
Schneider Electric OT Security — ICS asset protection.
Siemens OT Security — industrial cybersecurity and SCADA protection.
Dragos Platform — OT threat detection and incident response.
Customer-facing auth and registration for B2C/B2B apps.
Access certifications, lifecycle automation, access requests.
Just-in-time privileged access to servers and infrastructure.
Device posture as a condition of SSO access; integrates with MDM.
SaaS PAM — same core capabilities as self-hosted; uses SRS for credential rotation and PSM-as-a-Service for session recording.
Least-privilege enforcement on Windows/Mac endpoints (PEDM).
Secrets management for DevOps pipelines and machine identities.
AI-powered next-gen antivirus — entry-level endpoint prevention.
Full EDR/XDR with cross-domain detection and investigation.
CNAPP covering CSPM, CWPP, and CIEM for cloud workloads.
ITDR and privileged access for human, non-human, and AI agent identities. AD and Entra ID protection.
External attack surface management and asset discovery.
Standalone cloud SIEM product; FedRAMP authorized.
24/7 managed detection and response with human analyst coverage.
Email threat protection — anti-phishing, safe links, BEC defense.
CSPM and CWPP for Azure, AWS, and GCP workloads.
Cloud-native SIEM/SOAR on Azure — separate from Defender XDR.
DLP, data classification, insider risk, and information protection.
MDM/MAM for Windows, iOS, Android, macOS.
Static AI and behavioral detection — entry-level endpoint.
Agent-based CWPP for VMs, containers, and Kubernetes.
Identity threat detection — AD deception and credential risk.
Third-party log ingestion for SIEM-style analytics and hunting.
Network discovery and agentless device fingerprinting.
EDR/XDR with network, cloud, and endpoint telemetry correlation.
AI-native SOC platform — SIEM, SOAR, UEBA, and ASM unified.
External attack surface management — continuous internet exposure monitoring.
MFA, device trust, ZTNA, and SSO — top Cisco security product.
DNS-layer security, SWG, CASB, and ZTNA via Cisco SSE.
Cisco EDR/EPP — formerly AMP for Endpoints.
On-premises IGA platform — separate SKU from IdentityNow SaaS.
Governs contractor, partner, and vendor identities.
Real-time EDR with pre- and post-infection endpoint protection.
SIEM with multi-vendor correlation, log management, compliance.
Security orchestration and automation workbench.
Cloud-native application protection — formerly Lacework.
AV, anti-phishing, encryption, sandboxing for endpoints.
Harmony Email & Collaboration — cloud email security and SaaS app protection.
SOC platform with XDR and MDR powered by ThreatCloud AI.
Cloud-hosted vulnerability management and risk prioritisation.
SIEM and UEBA with integrated managed detection and response.
CNAPP for multi-cloud environments — CSPM and workload protection.
Fully managed MDR with 24/7 analyst coverage on InsightIDR.
On-prem vulnerability scanner — practitioner and SMB tier.
On-premises VM platform for air-gapped and regulated environments.
OT/ICS vulnerability and asset visibility for industrial environments.
Advanced URL and attachment sandboxing with click-time protection.
Unified DLP + DSPM across email, cloud, and endpoint channels.
User activity monitoring and insider risk detection (ObserveIT).
SOAR with 300+ integrations — separate SKU from Splunk ES.
APM, infrastructure monitoring, and log analytics for DevOps.
Zero-trust access for privileged users to on-prem and cloud systems.
Least-privilege enforcement on Windows/Mac endpoints.
Commvault Cloud SaaS — formerly Metallic; SaaS-native backup for M365, Salesforce, and endpoints.
Veeam-hosted backup-as-a-service for M365 and Entra ID.
Kubernetes-native backup and disaster recovery platform.
Access certifications, provisioning, and role management.
JIT privileged access for cloud and hybrid infrastructure.
TLS certificate lifecycle, enterprise PKI, workload identity, and secrets management. Formerly Venafi; acquired by CyberArk Oct 2024.
Harmony SASE (formerly Harmony Connect) — SWG, CASB, ZTNA, and FWaaS in a cloud-delivered SSE platform.
Network access control (NAC), device posture enforcement, and microsegmentation policy. Primary NAC platform for enterprise networks.
Secrets engine, PKI, dynamic credentials, lease management
External risk ratings, continuous monitoring, supply chain risk
100+ framework templates, continuous control monitoring, auditor portal
Enterprise SIEM with UBA, network analytics, and SOAR integration. Available on-prem and as SaaS (QRadar on Cloud).
Data activity monitoring, DB vulnerability assessment, data compliance reporting. Strong in regulated industries.
IAM/CIAM platform: MFA, SSO, identity governance, adaptive access.
CRYSTALS-Kyber/Dilithium HSM support, crypto-agility discovery, integration with z/OS cryptographic services. Aligned to NIST PQC FIPS 203/204/205.
Unified data security: encryption, tokenisation, key management, HSM (Luna), post-quantum key migration. NIST PQC FIPS 203/204/205 ready.
Hardware security module for key generation, storage, cryptographic operations. FIPS 140-3 Level 3. Market-leading in financial services, PKI, and payment processing.
Integrated Risk Management, policy lifecycle, audit, vendor risk
ServiceNow ITSM — incident/change management, CMDB, and security-ITSM integration via SecOps connector.
Jira Service Management — incident ticketing and lightweight CMDB; asset discovery requires integration with third-party tools.
Recorded Future — AI-powered threat intelligence platform with actor tracking, IOC feeds, and SIEM/SOAR integrations.
Recorded Future Brand Intelligence module — lookalike domain detection, social media impersonation, and dark web credential monitoring.
Mandiant Advantage — actor intelligence, vulnerability intelligence, and digital threat monitoring powered by frontline IR data.
Flashpoint — dark web and criminal forum intelligence; covers brand monitoring and fraud TI for financial services.
Dynatrace — full-stack APM, infrastructure monitoring, Davis AI anomaly detection, and AppSec module for runtime vulnerability detection.
Datadog — infrastructure monitoring, APM, and Cloud Security Management; also covers Cloud SIEM for cloud-native log analysis.
SolarWinds Observability — network performance monitoring (NPM) and server/application monitor (SAM). Legacy on-prem installed base still prevalent in APAC banks.
ZeroFox — brand monitoring, phishing kit detection, automated takedown, social media impersonation, and executive digital footprint protection.
